chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-80 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 5 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 09.02.2026 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG a/w DSP Aurangzeb Khan Sub Division Sohrab Goth, District East, Karachi; SIP Naveed Akhter PS SSHIA East Karachi and SIP/IO Khadim Hussain Mari --------- Through this petition, the petitioner claims following relief(s): “To direct the respondent number 4 and 5 for early recovery of petitioner wife before this honorable court and pass appropriate order in the prime interest of justice and equity.” It appears that wife of the petitioner alleged abductee has appeared before the Sukkur Bench of this Court on 21.01.2026, wherein she has contended that she has obtained Khula from the present petitioner. Since the alleged abductee has surfaced and appeared before the Court of law, therefore, no case for indulgence of this Court is made out. Consequently, this petition fails and is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Nadir*
